evidence: valueTypeName emits () for Unit returns; validateEntrypointParameters rejects Unit parameters and validateState rejects scalar Unit storage; Tests/Backend/Wasm/WasmNearDiagnostics.lean covers Unit parameter and Unit scalar state rejection.
valueTypeName emits bool, literal emits true/false, and predicates/assertions lower to Rust; bool scalar storage and bool map values are accepted by validateState.
valueTypeName emits u32, literal emits Nu32, and U32 ABI parameters / locals / map values lower with the u32 codec helpers; cast/assignOp tests cover U32 numeric use.
valueTypeName emits u64, literal emits Nu64, and U64 scalar/map storage, ABI parameters, returns, and arithmetic lower directly; Counter, Ledger, and Accum fixtures cover it.
valueTypeName emits [u64; 4], literal emits four-limb arrays, and hash/hash_two_to_one intrinsics plus hash map values lower with sha256 helpers; Hasher fixture and diagnostics cover it.
The wasm-near target profile advertises data.fixed_array for the EmitWat path, but Rust sourcegen v0 rejects fixed-array ABI parameters/returns and lowerExpr rejects array literals/indexing.
The wasm-near target profile advertises data.struct for the EmitWat path, but Rust sourcegen v0 rejects struct ABI parameters/returns and lowerExpr rejects struct literals/field access.

valueTypeName emits u64 (same as numeric scalars), literal emits {value}u64, and Address ABI parameters/returns/event fields/storage lower directly; pattern match exhaustiveness verified across wasm-near backend.

wasm-near IR v0 rejects data.dynamic_bytes; valueTypeName returns error "wasm-near IR v0 does not support Bytes" and validateEntrypointParameters/validateEntrypointReturn reject bytes parameters and returns.

wasm-near IR v0 rejects data.dynamic_bytes; valueTypeName returns error "wasm-near IR v0 does not support String" and validateEntrypointParameters/validateEntrypointReturn reject string parameters and returns.

wasm-near IR v0 lowers U8 as i32 (same as U32); literal emits {value}u32; U8 ABI parameters/locals/returns/event fields/storage lower with the u32 codec helpers; pattern match exhaustiveness verified.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects U128; valueTypeName returns error "wasm-near IR v0 does not support U128" and validateEntrypointParameters/Return reject U128 parameters and returns.
scalar state lowers to a pub struct field read/written via self.<id>; U32/U64/Bool/Hash scalar shapes are accepted by validateState and Counter covers U64 scalar storage.
validateState accepts only Map<U64|Hash, U32|U64|Bool|Hash, N>; Ledger covers Map<U64, U64, 16> and Tests/Backend/Wasm/WasmNearDiagnostics.lean covers zero-capacity and U32-key map rejection.
The wasm-near target profile advertises storage.array for the EmitWat path, but Rust sourcegen v0 rejects array state during validateState.
literal emits Nu32 and is covered by cast/assignOp diagnostics and U32 codec helpers.
literal emits Nu64 and is covered by Counter, Ledger, Hasher, and Accum fixtures plus arithmetic/return diagnostics.
literal emits true/false and is covered by the conditional and assert diagnostics and the Accum fixture.
literal emits four-limb [u64; 4] arrays and is covered by the Hasher fixture and the cast-mismatch diagnostic.
literal emits {value}u64 and is covered by validateLiteralBounds and pattern match exhaustiveness across the wasm-near backend; address is treated as a u64 scalar.
wasm-near IR v0 emits i32.const for U8 literals (same as U32); covered by literalType and checkLiteralBounds with max 255.
wasm-near IR v0 does not support U128 literals; literal function returns placeholder, literalType maps to .u128 but valueTypeName rejects it.
lowerEffectExpr emits __pf_account_id_hash_u64(&env::predecessor_account_id()); Hasher fixture covers it and the context-as-statement diagnostic guards misuse.
EmitWat lowers contextRead userIdHash to __pf_ctx_user_hash (sha256 predecessor account id bytes); NearFungibleToken callerHash covers hash-keyed balance transfers.
lowerEffectExpr emits __pf_account_id_hash_u64(&env::current_account_id()); AccountIdHash helper generation is gated by moduleUsesAccountIdHash.
lowerEffectExpr emits env::block_height(); capability envBlock is present in the wasm-near profile.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects timestamp with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 sourcegen is frozen and rejects epochHeight with an explicit diagnostic; EmitWat is the canonical path for env.epoch_height.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects chainId with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects gasPrice with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects gasLeft with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects baseFee with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects prevRandao with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 sourcegen is frozen and rejects randomSeed with an explicit diagnostic; EmitWat is the canonical path for env.random_seed.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects origin with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects coinbase with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
wasm-near IR v0 context read catch-all rejects blockHash with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
assignOpSymbol emits += and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; Accum fixture exercises it and immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits -= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits *= and the Accum fixture emits acc *= 2u64; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits /= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits %= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits &= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits |= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits ^= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits <<= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
assignOpSymbol emits >>= and lowerStatement lowers compound assignment to a mutable local; immutable-target diagnostics guard misuse.
lowerExpr delegates to literal; all fixtures and diagnostics use literal expressions.
lowerExpr emits local names; Ledger set/get and most diagnostics use local bindings.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects array literals in lowerExpr; data.fixed_array is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects array indexing in lowerExpr; data.fixed_array is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects struct literals in lowerExpr; data.struct is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects struct field access in lowerExpr; data.struct is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs + rhs); Counter increment and arithmetic diagnostics cover it.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs - rhs) with operand parenthesization.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs * rhs); Accum fixture exercises it.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs / rhs).
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs % rhs).
lowerExpr emits (base).pow(exp as u32) for U32/U64 bases after numeric inference.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs & rhs).
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs | rhs).
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs ^ rhs).
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs << rhs).
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs >> rhs).
lowerExpr emits Rust as casts after ensureCastType validation; cast-mismatch diagnostics reject unsupported casts such as Hash to U64.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs == rhs) after numeric/bool/hash equality validation.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs != rhs) after numeric/bool/hash inequality validation.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs < rhs); Accum assert exercises greater-than and numeric comparison validation covers it.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs <= rhs) after numeric comparison validation.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs > rhs); Accum fixture asserts (acc > 0u64).
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs >= rhs) after numeric comparison validation.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs && rhs) after boolean operand validation.
lowerExpr emits parenthesized (lhs || rhs) after boolean operand validation.
lowerExpr emits (!value) after boolean operand validation.
lowerExpr emits [a, b, c, d] dynamic four-limb construction after U64 part validation.
lowerExpr emits __pf_hash(preimage) and moduleHelpers emits the sha256-backed helper when cryptoHash is used; Hasher fixture covers it.
lowerExpr emits __pf_hash_two_to_one(lhs, rhs) and moduleHelpers emits the sha256-backed helper when cryptoHash is used.
lowerExpr delegates to lowerEffectExpr, which validates expression-only effects and rejects statement-only effects; fixtures and diagnostics cover the split.
inferExprType types nativeValue as U64 and Rust sourcegen lowers it to env::attached_deposit(); Tests/Backend/Wasm/WasmNearDiagnostics.lean covers the rendered expression.

EmitWat lowers crosscallInvoke to promise_create/promise_return using module.nearCrosscallStrings address literals; wasm-near target profile admits crosscall.invoke for the canonical EmitWat path while Rust sourcegen remains frozen.
EmitWat rejects typed cross-contract calls with an explicit NEAR diagnostic; use untyped crosscallInvoke / nearCrosscallInvokePool with string-pool literals.
EmitWat rejects value-bearing typed cross-contract calls; NEAR value transfer is modeled on nearCrosscallInvokePool/crosscallInvoke deposit operands.
EmitWat rejects static typed cross-contract calls as EVM-only.
EmitWat rejects delegate typed cross-contract calls as EVM-only.
EmitWat rejects contract creation as EVM-only.
EmitWat rejects create2 contract creation as EVM-only.
wasm-near Rust sourcegen rejects named-callee cross-program calls (crosscallNamed) with an explicit diagnostic; crosscallNamed is ZK-lane only (RFC 0015 D4).
wasm-near IR v0 rejects ABI-packed crosscall (Call[]) as EVM-specific with an explicit diagnostic.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects ecrecover (secp256k1) as EVM-specific with an explicit diagnostic.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects EIP-712 permit digest as EVM-specific with an explicit diagnostic.

EmitWat lowers nearCrosscallInvokePool to promise_create with __pf_crosscall_pool_ptr/__pf_crosscall_pool_len runtime string-pool indices; NearFungibleToken ft_transfer_call fixture covers sender-hash plus amount ft_on_transfer args.

EmitWat lowers nearPromiseThen to promise_then on the current contract account using module.nearCrosscallStrings callback method literals; wasm-near target profile admits near.promise for the canonical EmitWat path.
EmitWat lowers nearPromiseResultsCount to promise_results_count in callback entrypoints; Plan tracks usesPromiseResults.
EmitWat lowers nearPromiseResultStatus to promise_result and returns the NEAR status code as U64.
EmitWat lowers nearPromiseResultU64 via __pf_promise_result_u64 (promise_result + read_register Borsh U64); NearFungibleToken ft_resolve_transfer returns pending amount minus unused callback amount.
lowerEffectExpr emits self.<id>; Counter get covers it and the read-as-statement diagnostic guards misuse.
lowerEffectStmt emits self.<id> = value;; Counter increment covers it and the write-as-expression diagnostic guards misuse.
validateEffectStmtTypes and lowerEffectStmt both reject storage.scalar.assign_op in wasm-near IR v0; diagnostic covers it.
lowerEffectExpr emits env::storage_has_key after key-type validation; statement-misuse diagnostic guards it.
lowerEffectExpr emits __pf_decode_<t>(env::storage_read(...)); Ledger get covers it.
lowerEffectExpr and lowerEffectStmt emit __pf_map_set_<t>(key, value); Ledger fixtures cover expression and statement forms.
lowerEffectExpr and lowerEffectStmt emit __pf_map_set_<t>(key, value); Ledger set covers the statement form.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects storage array reads in lowerEffectExpr; storage.array is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects storage array writes in lowerEffectStmt; storage.array is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects storage array struct field reads in lowerEffectExpr; storage.array/data.struct are present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects storage array struct field writes in lowerEffectStmt; storage.array/data.struct are present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects struct storage field reads in lowerEffectExpr; data.struct is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects struct storage field writes in lowerEffectStmt; data.struct is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
lowerStoragePathRead emits a single-segment mapKey decode for map storage; Ledger-style maps cover it and empty/nested-path diagnostics guard the boundary.
lowerStoragePathWrite emits a single-segment mapKey __pf_map_set_<t> for map storage; the empty/nested-path diagnostics guard the boundary.
validateEffectStmtTypes and lowerEffectStmt both reject storage.path.assign_op in wasm-near IR v0.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects storage.dynamic.array.push in validateEffectStmtTypes and lowerEffectStmt because dynamic array storage is not lowered.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects storage.dynamic.array.pop in validateEffectStmtTypes and lowerEffectStmt because dynamic array storage is not lowered.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects memory.array.set in validateEffectStmtTypes and lowerEffectStmt because memory arrays are not lowered.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects memory.array.new in inferExprType and lowerExpr because memory arrays are not lowered.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects memory.array.length in inferExprType and lowerExpr because memory arrays are not lowered.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects memory.array.get in inferExprType and lowerExpr because memory arrays are not lowered.
lowerEffectExpr emits predecessor/current account-id or block-height reads; Hasher fixture covers userId and the context-as-statement diagnostic guards misuse.
lowerEffectStmt emits near_sdk::log! with a JSON object after field-type validation; empty-name and event-as-expression diagnostics guard misuse.
wasm-near Rust sourcegen v0 rejects indexed events in lowerEffectStmt; the target profile carries eventsEmit for non-indexed events only.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects checkErc721Received (EVM-only IERC721Receiver callback; PF-P2-02) with an explicit diagnostic.
wasm-near IR v0 rejects checkErc1155Received (EVM-only IERC1155Receiver callback; PF-P2-02) with an explicit diagnostic.
storage paths only support a single mapKey segment in wasm-near IR v0; any field segment is rejected by inferStoragePathType/lowerStoragePathRead.
storage paths only support a single mapKey segment in wasm-near IR v0; index segments require unsupported array storage.
inferStoragePathType and lowerStoragePathRead/lowerStoragePathWrite handle a single mapKey at the map boundary; Ledger fixtures and path diagnostics cover it.
lowerStatement emits let name: type = value;; most fixtures and diagnostics use immutable let bindings.
lowerStatement emits let mut name: type = value;; Accum fixture and assignment diagnostics cover mutable bindings.
lowerStatement emits name = value; for mutable locals; immutable-target and invalid-target diagnostics guard misuse.
lowerStatement emits name <op>= value; for mutable locals; Accum fixture and immutable-target diagnostics cover it.
lowerStatement delegates to lowerEffectStmt, which rejects expression-only effects; storage fixtures and diagnostics cover the split.
lowerStatement emits assert!(cond, "msg");; Accum fixture and the conditional/bool diagnostics cover it.
lowerStatement emits assert_eq!(lhs, rhs, "msg"); after equality-type validation.

wasm-near Rust sourcegen v0 rejects release statements; the SDK allocator manages heap-backed locals and explicit name-based release has no Rust lowering. The direct-WAT EmitWat backend lowers release to __pf_arr_dealloc for minimalMalloc/nearWeeModel, but that path is not tracked by this Rust sourcegen coverage manifest.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects if/else statements in lowerStatement; control.conditional is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects bounded for loops in lowerStatement; control.bounded_loop is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
Rust sourcegen v0 rejects unbounded while loops in lowerStatement; control.unbounded_loop is present on the target profile for EmitWat coverage.
lowerStatement emits return value;; validateModule requires non-Unit returns to end with return and return-type diagnostics guard mismatches.
lowerStatement emits panic!("message"); for revert with message and panic!("revertWithError"); for revertWithError.
lowerStatement emits panic!("revertWithError"); for structured error reverts.

wasm-near IR v0 rejects dynamic arrays with explicit diagnostics in validateEntrypointParameters, validateEntrypointReturn, validateStatementTypes event fields, validateValueType, and valueTypeName; ValueType.array is recognized but not lowered.

wasm-near IR v0 rejects storage.dynamicArray in validateState, scalarStateType, mapStateTypes, and inferStoragePathType with explicit diagnostics; StateKind.dynamicArray is recognized but not lowered.
